positive: A stunning, high-contrast graphic illustration of a cosmic cityscape skyline, featuring stylized Art Deco skyscrapers integrated with celestial elements like moons and nebulae. The main subject should be a bold, interlocking pattern of geometric astronomical symbols (stars, constellations, planetary rings) set against a gradient twilight sky. Use deep sapphire blues, vibrant magenta purples, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centralized and highly symmetrical, designed as a seamless repeating pattern for apparel printing. Style: Modernist vector art meets retro-futurism, crisp lines, clean silhouettes, high saturation, dramatic volumetric lighting, centered composition, graphic novelty illustration.
